series_metadata.series_description: File contains written report of findings of telephone interviews with claimants, information faxed in by claimants, base period employer payroll and local office data, dependency documents and work search location information random audits of paid and denied claims. These samples are selected weekly from a random selection program in the SUN system, a federal system containing all claims information, operated by the Department of Labor.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office , image and . ; Electronic: in office 5 years
